response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile individual contributor with genuine distributed-systems depth and recent hands-on exposure to agentic tooling, but this is an executive search. He shows no evidence of the hard requirements that define the role: no senior technical-leadership tenure at scale-ups, no track record scaling an engineering org from 10 to 30+ or developing a leadership layer, no production multi-agent AI systems operated under financial consequences, and no experience governing outsourced delivery or communicating with a board. His fintech exposure (RIDE Capital) and AI-agent work (MCP code generators at re:cinq) are IC-level and recent, not the sustained operating experience a CTO of a regulated agentic-fintech scale-up requires.
strengths: Deep backend and low-latency distributed-systems experience (micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Broad polyglot engineering craftsmanship with TDD/CI/CD discipline and some fintech exposure (RIDE Capital)
concerns: No executive or people-leadership experience; career is almost entirely individual-contributor roles
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems — agentic work is recent developer tooling, not regulated production operations
No track record scaling engineering teams, governing external delivery partners, or board-level communication

key_factors.factor: Missing executive leadership and team-scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes environments
Strong distributed-systems and backend depth with recent agentic tooling exposure
